title: 3-vehicle crash on Hwy. 401 in Scarborough sends woman to hospital
description: The eastbound express lane on the highway was mostly shut down for several hours, with only one middle lane open, police said.

title: Solidarity rally held for Palestinian prisoners, calls for justice and human rights protection
description: SARAJEVO, April 19 (FENA) – The Palestinian Community in Bosnia and Herzegovina organized a solidarity gathering in Sarajevo on Saturday in support of Palestinian prisoners, highlighting the difficult situation of more than 9,600 detainees, including women and children, and calling for justice and freedom.

title: Missing 82-year old Alberta senior found dead near Kindersley
description: Alberta's Consort RCMP have reported that Diane Cooper has been found dead near Kindersley, Sask. (Image Credit: Submitted/Saskatchewan RCMP)

title: Yankees' Cam Schlittler on Boston trolls' attacks: Didn't they learn their lesson?
description: "(You'd) think after last time,” he said, “how much they were talking before, that they might be trying to quiet it down a little bit."

title: The Madison (Paramount+)
description: The Madison is a neo-Western television series created by Taylor Sheridan for Paramount+. The series follows the Clyburn family, originally from New York City, who relocate to the Madison River valley of southwest Montana for emotional recovery following a major life-changing tragedy that both shocks and permanently changes the family.

title: Prize Money Incentive at Singapore Junior Championship
description: Singapore: BFG Golf has been named as the Presenting Partner of the Singapore Junior Golf Championship, an event at which S$10,000 in prize money will be awarded to the individual boys’ and girls’ champions as well as the team winners.

title: Salesforce’s Headless 360: Turning CRM into Pure AI Agent Fuel
description: Salesforce's Headless 360 exposes its full platform as APIs for AI agents, ditching browsers for direct data and workflow access. Over 100 tools ship now, reshaping enterprise software amid SaaS pressures.

title: Shreveport gunman ID’d as Shamar Elkins, who murdered eight kids, was Army vet, shared post of daughter hours before slaughter
